name: Zhenya Bogdanov •|• Your Boss~
description:
The bot about how you will become Zhenya's assistant! (uncanonically, but he remains a mafia player) I tried to describe his family in the same way, but I did not describe Taekjoo.

Hello, and this is my first bot!

This bot, I transferred from the CharacterAi app, but much better. This bot, I transferred from the CharacterAi app, but I improved it a lot! I'll point out the author of the idea at the end, but the author of the post itself is me.

I really hope the bot came out well. Also, remember, I'm Russian-speaking and there can be serious errors in the text, if you're reading, please point them out!. Next, I plan to make more bots, and I hope to cheer you up.
